channel.title: GitHub Nix Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Nix in GitHub

item.title: cachix/devenv
item.description: Fast, Declarative, Reproducible, and Composable Developer Environments

item.title: Misterio77/nix-starter-configs
item.description: Simple and documented config templates to help you get started with NixOS + home-manager + flakes. All the boilerplate you need!

item.title: NixOS/nixpkgs
item.description: Nix Packages collection & NixOS

item.title: moergo-sc/glove80-zmk-config
item.description: This repo is the official configuration of the MoErgo Glove80 wireless split contoured keyboard. Use it to develop your own keymap and easily build your own ZMK firmware to run on your Glove80.

item.title: NixOS/nixfmt
item.description: The soon-to-be official formatter for Nix code

item.title: fufexan/dotfiles
item.description: NixOS system config & Home-Manager user config

item.title: hyprwm/hyprland-protocols
item.description: Wayland protocol extensions for Hyprland

item.title: ryan4yin/nix-config
item.description: ❄️ my nix config for both desktops(NixOS+macOS) and homelab servers(NixOS).

item.title: nix-community/nix-on-droid
item.description: Nix-enabled environment for your Android device. [maintainers=@t184256,@Gerschtli]

item.title: holochain/holonix
item.description: NixOS && Holochain

item.title: nix-community/home-manager
item.description: Manage a user environment using Nix [maintainer=@rycee]

item.title: NixOS/nixos-hardware
item.description: A collection of NixOS modules covering hardware quirks.

item.title: LnL7/nix-darwin
item.description: nix modules for darwin

item.title: numtide/devshell
item.description: Per project developer environments

item.title: danth/stylix
item.description: System-wide colorscheming and typography for NixOS

item.title: nix-community/nixvim
item.description: Configure Neovim with Nix! [maintainer=@pta2002, @traxys, @GaetanLepage]

item.title: ryan4yin/nixos-and-flakes-book
item.description: 🛠️ ❤️ Want to know NixOS & Flakes in detail? Looking for a beginner-friendly tutorial? Then you've come to the right place! 想要学习使用 NixOS 与 Flakes 吗？在寻找一份新手友好的教程？那你可来对地方了！

item.title: LGUG2Z/nixos-wsl-starter
item.description: A sane, batteries-included starter template for running NixOS on WSL

item.title: the-nix-way/dev-templates
item.description: Dev environments for numerous languages based on Nix flakes [maintainer=@lucperkins]

item.title: nix-community/nixos-generators
item.description: Collection of image builders [maintainer=@Lassulus]

item.title: nix-community/nix-direnv
item.description: A fast, persistent use_nix/use_flake implementation for direnv [maintainer=@Mic92 / @bbenne10]

item.title: nix-community/disko
item.description: Declarative disk partitioning and formatting using nix [maintainer=@Lassulus]

item.title: ryantm/agenix
item.description: age-encrypted secrets for NixOS and Home manager

item.title: confluentinc/coding-in-motion
item.description: Source code for the "Coding in Motion" series.
